description_long: This house features a steeply pitched, shingled gable roof with two prominent chimneys rising from the rear. The facade is characterized by a combination of stone and wood textures, with the lower level constructed from rough stone and the upper stories clad in weathered wood. The front displays four symmetrically arranged windows on the upper floor, each with wooden shutters, and two doors on the ground floor, suggesting a possible duplex or multi-family dwelling. The side and rear views reveal a lack of windows, emphasizing the verticality and narrow footprint of the structure. The roof is covered in small, overlapping tiles, giving it a rustic, old-world appearance. Overall, the house evokes a historic European or medieval urban style, suitable for dense city neighborhoods.
description: A tall, narrow house with a steep shingled gable roof, stone lower walls, and wood-clad upper stories, featuring symmetrical windows and rustic architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with two doors, four upper windows with shutters, and a steep gable roof.
description_view_1: Left side view dominated by the shingled roof, two chimneys, and a mostly windowless stone wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with four upper windows, one shutter open, and a plain stone lower wall.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the expanse of the shingled roof and a solid stone wall with no windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Double wooden doors at ground level with stone steps, no porch, and minimal decorative elements.
